<steps id="0" last="4"><step id="2" type="ActionStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Send baseline GET request to https://sis-ws-all-dev.azurewebsites.net/sis2-ws-all/services/searchresults?language=en&profileId=1&searchterm="OIL AND PUMP"&top=50&skip=0&count=true&isMultipleProductFamilyFacets=true&allowExpandedMiningProducts=true with headers Accept: application/searchservice-v2.1+json and Authorization: Bearer token de Dev.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">HTTP 200 is returned and count is present.</parameterizedString></step><step id="3" type="ActionStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Capture baseline count from the first response payload.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Baseline count value is stored.</parameterizedString></step><step id="4" type="ActionStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Apply skip offset (skip=50, then skip=0) while keeping searchterm and count=true.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Follow-up response returns HTTP 200 with count value.</parameterizedString></step><step id="5" type="ActionStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Compare baseline count and follow-up count before and after the scenario.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Count remains unchanged.</parameterizedString></step></steps>
